purpose: The full in-app agent chat surface — a ~3000-line behemoth that renders streaming worker output (assistant text, thinking, tool_use, tool_result, task_progress, compaction, errors), supports multi-tab chat per dashboard with persistent session resumption, image attachments, drag/drop/paste, permission relay (control_request → PermissionModal), provider/model switching (Claude or Codex), conversation auto-save, and complete dashboard+tab routing of streamed output even when the user switches contexts mid-stream. Reads/writes via `getClaudeSlice(state, surface)` so 'code' and 'chat' surfaces hold independent slices (messages, status, isProcessing, tabs, attachments). Dispatches CLAUDE_APPEND_MSG / CLAUDE_UPDATE_MESSAGES / CLAUDE_STASH_APPEND_MSG / CLAUDE_TAB_STASH_APPEND_MSG for current vs stashed contexts; uses extensive refs for stream-state so React doesn't rerender per-character.

exports.name: ClaudeView
exports.signature: { onClose?, hideHeader?, viewMode?, tab?='code', chatAgentId?: string|null, surface?='code' }

gotchas: MASSIVE ref surface — 25+ refs (sessionMapRef, taskDashboardMapRef, taskTabMapRef, taskPidMapRef, toolCallIndexRef, streamingBlocksRef, stashStreamingBlocksRef, etc.). Adding a feature here without understanding stash/route logic will silently drop streamed output for non-active tabs.

`surface` ('code'|'chat') gates which slice of AppContext is read; chat-mode dashboards must be 'chat-agent-XXXX' ids. Code surface explicitly rejects any dashboardId starting with 'chat-agent-' to prevent context bleed.

Three independent buffer/flush systems: text (32ms), thinking (32ms), activity stderr (500ms). Each has its own commit + flush + index ref. Forgetting to flush before a context switch loses partial messages.

isResumedSessionRef gates whether assistant/user events are shown — when --resume is used, history replay events should be DROPPED (already in UI). The flag clears on init, content_block_start, message_stop, result, or compaction.
sawStreamingRef de-duplicates the trailing 'assistant' summary event vs the streaming content_block events that already added the same content.
Health-check polls getActiveWorkers every 8s and tolerates 3 consecutive failures before hard-resetting active task tracking — a single transient IPC error must not wipe state.

Auto-save (debounced 500ms) writes to convId for ANY messages, but only marks the conversation 'official' once a user message exists. Closing the app before debounce fires loses the last seconds of input.
Per-dashboard:tab prompt text stash (promptStashRef) — switching tabs swaps the textarea's value invisibly. Forgetting to stash on tab/dashboard switch erases the user's draft.

Codex provider has a separate code path: `item.completed` events stream agent_message text differently, and `codexStreamedTaskIdsRef` flags whether the trailing lastMessage from worker-complete should be appended (avoid double).
Permission auto-approve (allowedToolsRef Set) is session-scoped only — survives within a tab but is wiped on full reload.
patterns: Streaming state lives entirely in refs; React state updates are dispatched through the context reducer with a functional updater (CLAUDE_UPDATE_MESSAGES + updater fn) to avoid stale closures.

Stashing pattern: when the active dashboard or tab changes, every relevant ref (activeTaskIdsRef, codexStreamedTaskIdsRef, currentTextIndexRef, toolCallIndexRef) is written to a per-dashboard stash map and re-loaded from the target's stash.

Three routing paths in worker-output: (a) active-dashboard+active-tab → handleChunk/processEvent, (b) active-dashboard+other-tab → routeToTabStash, (c) inactive-dashboard → buffer to dashboard stash slice. Each path duplicates the JSON event parsing.
Tool calls render via ToolCallBlock with rich per-tool formatters (Read/Edit/Write/Bash/Grep/Glob/Task/WebFetch/WebSearch/TodoWrite/NotebookEdit) — Edit/Write default to expanded, others collapsed.
AskUserQuestion tool_use renders an interactive options card; submitting calls back through onSendAnswer→sendText to keep the chat as a normal turn.
Conversation history injected only on FRESH sessions (no sessionId) — once a CLI --resume sessionId exists, the CLI owns history; injecting it again would double-context.
conventions: Surface-aware dispatch actions: CLAUDE_APPEND_MSG / CLAUDE_STASH_APPEND_MSG / CLAUDE_TAB_STASH_APPEND_MSG / CLAUDE_UPDATE_MESSAGES all carry `surface`.
Tab IDs: 'default' for the first tab; new tabs get string ids assigned by the reducer.
MODEL_OPTIONS hard-coded at module scope; resolveModel() falls back to provider's first option if saved value is invalid.
Conversation IDs: 'conv_' + Date.now(); stored to disk via api.saveConversation.
